calibration.calibration_note: With hazard_harm=0.02, avg episode ~182 steps (was ~18 with 0.5). Actual episode time higher.

items.title: MECH-463 channel-agnosticism: exogenous-urgency variance decomposition at a SECOND incumbent identity (residue_weighted primary, f secondary)
items.note: Closes the channel-agnosticism half that V3-EXQ-785a explicitly left UNTESTED. 785a refuted MECH-463 concentration at ONE incumbent identity (harm_weighted; var_total fold 0.970, share gap +0.0036 under 1 SE), so MECH-463 was left at candidate rather than demoted. Two regimes from the scoping spike (REE_assembly/evidence/planning/mech463_channel_agnosticism_scoping_spike_2026-07-19.md): PRIMARY residue_incumbent (rho_residue=20.0, harm channel ON -- a reweighting, not an ablation; incumbent share .585/.887/.868 across seeds 0/1/2 with harm surviving as a genuine second component), SECONDARY f_incumbent (lambda_ethical=0.05). The entropy axis stays EXCLUDED (CH:mech341 absorbs ~99-115% at every setting -- arithmetically forced), and D1/D2 gain + softmax temperature were ruled out structurally in code: both act downstream of the per-candidate component vectors so neither can change incumbent identity. novelty_weighted is DEAD BY CONSTRUCTION (e3_selector.py:963-971), so licensed breadth is TWO cost-side primary components, not the full channel set. FIXES one 785a defect: whole-run gate AND-aggregation (all(gate_green)) replaced with _lib/precondition_gate.aggregate_arm_gates any-arm-green -- at two regimes the old form is exactly the V3-EXQ-785 autopsy defect where one red arm vacates a green arm; Does NOT supersede 785a -- its harm_weighted result is this run comparison arm. GOV-REUSE-1: decisive readout is incumbent share under exogenous urgency at a NON-harm incumbent; checked 785 and 785a (the only runs carrying urgency_applied at all), both run rho_residue at its 0.5 default, so not recoverable by reanalysis. Smoke PASS: both regimes produce their pre-registered incumbent, fidelity err 2.8e-17.
